content.speakerText: You need to change at Green Park. The train heads north from there.
content.speakerTextCn: 您需要在绿园站换乘，之后列车往北开。
expectedAnswers: Wait, is it the same platform?
So I just stay on the same platform?
North? I thought it was heading west — did I get the wrong line?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确询问换乘方式或方向是否正确
语言准确性：语法正确，使用恰当的疑问结构
表达自然度：符合口语习惯，语气自然
关键词覆盖：使用了 'platform', 'north', 'change' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: No, you’ll need to take the stairs to the next level. Look for the signs that say 'Line 5 - Northbound'.
content.speakerTextCn: 不，您得上楼梯到下一层，找标着‘5号线-北行’的指示牌。
expectedAnswers: Got it! I’ll follow the signs.
Thanks, I’ll keep an eye out for them.
Understood — I won’t miss the sign for Line 5 Northbound.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认收到指示并表达会执行
语言准确性：语法正确，使用恰当的回应句型
表达自然度：语气自然，符合英语母语者日常回应方式
关键词覆盖：使用了 'signs', 'Line 5', 'Northbound', 'stairs' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Your transfer is at Union Station. The next train runs south.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的换乘站在联合车站，下一班列车往南开。
expectedAnswers: South? I was told it was going east — can you double-check?
Okay, thanks. I’ll head to the southbound platform.
So I need to go down to the lower level for the southbound train?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确回应换乘信息，提出合理确认或表达理解
语言准确性：使用正确时态和口语结构
表达自然度：语气自然，符合真实场景对话节奏
关键词覆盖：使用了 'transfer', 'southbound', 'platform', 'level' 等核心词汇
